symptom: Toaster toasts unevenly — one side dark, one side light

preconditions: Unplug the toaster from the wall outlet
Allow to cool completely if recently used

steps.action: Unplug the toaster and let it cool completely
steps.what_to_look_for: Cord disconnected from outlet, toaster cool to touch
steps.visual_confirmation: Cord is free, no heat radiating from slots

steps.action: Look into both bread slots and compare the heating elements on each side
steps.what_to_look_for: One side may have a broken or discolored element while the other looks normal
steps.visual_confirmation: Both sides have intact, similar-looking nichrome wire elements
steps.if_issue_found: If one side's element is broken or darkened, that element has failed. Most consumer toasters require full replacement

steps.action: Remove the crumb tray and clean out all debris
steps.what_to_look_for: Heavy crumb accumulation on one side could insulate the element and cause uneven heating
steps.visual_confirmation: Crumb tray empty, interior cleared of debris on both sides equally

steps.action: Check the bread guides (the metal cage that holds the bread) for alignment
steps.what_to_look_for: The bread should sit centered between the two sets of elements. If the guide is bent, bread sits closer to one side
steps.visual_confirmation: Bread guide is centered and moves smoothly up and down
steps.if_issue_found: Gently bend the guide back to center with your fingers. Be careful — the metal is thin

steps.action: Check the reflector panels (shiny metal behind the elements) for damage or tarnish
steps.what_to_look_for: Reflectors redirect heat toward the bread. If one side is tarnished, bent, or missing, that side will toast less
steps.visual_confirmation: Both reflector panels are clean, shiny, and properly positioned
steps.if_issue_found: Gently clean tarnished reflectors with a damp cloth. If bent, carefully straighten

steps.action: Test with bread — observe if toasting is now even
steps.what_to_look_for: Toast a slice and check both sides for even browning
steps.visual_confirmation: Both sides of the bread are evenly toasted at medium setting
steps.safety_note: Stay with the toaster during testing
